entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The agricultural crop being evaluated for resistance to the sorghum midge pest

entities.name: SORGHUM MIDGE
entities.description: The pest insect, also known as Contarinia sorghicola, that infests sorghum crops

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The genetic or physiological ability of sorghum cultivars to withstand infestation by the sorghum midge

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: The state in India where the field screening experiments were conducted in 1980

entities.name: FIELD SCREENING
entities.description: The process of testing sorghum cultivars in the field to identify those resistant to sorghum midge

entities.name: PLANTING DATE ADJUSTMENT
entities.description: The technique of adjusting the planting date to synchronize crop flowering with the peak abundance of adult sorghum midges

entities.name: PLANTING INFESTED ROWS
entities.description: The practice of planting susceptible cultivars in infested rows 20 days before test cultivars to increase pest pressure

entities.name: SPREADING DAMAGED PANICLES
entities.description: The method of spreading sorghum panicles containing diapausing larvae in infested rows to increase pest abundance

entities.name: SPRINKLER IRRIGATION
entities.description: The use of sprinkler irrigation during the flowering stage in the post-rainy season to increase pest abundance

entities.name: CONTACT INSECTICIDES
entities.description: The selective use of insecticides to control non-target insects that interfere with the screening process

entities.name: CALOCORIS ANGUSTATUS
entities.description: A mirid insect that is controlled using contact insecticides to improve the efficiency of sorghum screening

entities.name: TETRASTICHUS DIPLOSIDIS
entities.description: An eulophid insect, also known as Aprostocetus diplosidis, controlled using contact insecticides to improve screening

entities.name: STAGGERED PLANTING
entities.description: The practice of planting test material in two sets at 14-day intervals to prevent the crop from escaping pest damage

entities.name: THIN PLANT STANDS
entities.description: The maintenance of low plant density to increase pest damage by preventing population dilution

entities.name: INFESTATION
entities.description: The state of being invaded or attacked by the sorghum midge pest
